title: boehmeria malabarica var. leioclada
intro: Boehmeria malabarica var. leioclada, also known as Indian nettle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the nettle family (Urticaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria malabarica var. leioclada include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to address various health issues and promote overall well-being.
